import time

class ResponseCacheMiddleware:
    def __init__(self, app, cache_ttl_seconds=60):
        self.app = app
        self.cache = {}  # Stores (response_data, timestamp_when_cached)
        self.cache_ttl_seconds = cache_ttl_seconds

    def __call__(self, request):
        cache_key = self._generate_cache_key(request)
        current_time = time.time()

        cached_entry = self.cache.get(cache_key)

        if cached_entry:
            response_data, cached_timestamp = cached_entry
            if (current_time - cached_timestamp) < self.cache_ttl_seconds:
                return response_data
            else:
                del self.cache[cache_key]
        
        response = self.app(request)
        self.cache[cache_key] = (response, current_time)
        
        return response

    def _generate_cache_key(self, request):
        method = request.get('method', 'GET').upper()
        path = request.get('path', '/')
        
        query_params = request.get('query_params', {})
        sorted_query_params = tuple(sorted(query_params.items()))
        
        return f"{method}:{path}:{hash(sorted_query_params)}"
